services.title: Services
services.vandens_pramogos_description: Experience the thrill of water sports and activities with our professional instructors.
services.vandens_motociklu_nuoma_description: Rent high-quality water motorcycles for an unforgettable experience on the water.
services.keliones_su_gidu_description: Join our guided tours to explore the best water routes and hidden gems.

hero.title: T-Jet-Rent
hero.subtitle: Experience the ultimate thrill of riding the waves with our premium jet ski rentals. Perfect for beginners and adrenaline junkies alike.

fleet.title: Our Fleet
fleet.subtitle: Choose from our selection of high-performance jet skis, each offering a unique experience on the water. All our equipment is regularly maintained and includes the latest safety features.

jetski1.description: Perfect for beginners, the Wave Runner X1 offers a stable and fun riding experience with enough power to satisfy thrill-seekers.

jetski2.description: A family-friendly option with extra seating capacity and good balance of performance and stability for all skill levels.

jetski3.description: Our premium model with superior power and luxury features for those seeking the ultimate jet ski experience.

testimonial1.text: The jet ski rental experience was amazing! The staff was friendly and helpful, making sure I was comfortable before heading out on the water. Will definitely come back!
testimonial1.name: Sarah Johnson

testimonial2.text: Top-notch equipment and service! I rented the Yamaha FX Cruiser and it was in perfect condition. The team provided excellent safety instructions and tips.
testimonial2.name: Mark Davis

testimonial3.text: Great family experience! We rented two jet skis for the day and had a blast. The pricing was reasonable and the booking process was smooth. Highly recommend!
testimonial3.name: Jennifer Williams

map.title: Our Location
map.location: Curonian Lagoon, Kuršmarės, formerly known as Prussian Sea

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Have questions or ready to book? Reach out to us!
contact.description: Reach us by phone, email, or social media. We're always ready to answer your questions.
contact.location: Curonian Lagoon, Kuršmarės, formerly known as Prussian Sea

footer.companyDescription: Experience the ultimate thrill on the water with our premium jet ski rentals. Established in 2010, we've been providing unforgettable water adventures.

activities.title: Water Activities
activities.jet_ski_rental_desc: Experience the thrill of riding the waves on our powerful jet skis. Perfect for adrenaline seekers and water sports enthusiasts.
activities.banana_boat_desc: Fun-filled banana boat rides for groups. Hold on tight for an exciting ride with friends and family!
activities.fishing_trips_desc: Enjoy a relaxing day of fishing in our beautiful waters. All equipment and guidance provided.
activities.beach_relaxation_desc: Unwind on our private beach with comfortable loungers and excellent service.

rental.title: Jet Ski Rental Packages
rental.subtitle: Choose the perfect rental package for your water adventure. All our jet skis are well-maintained and come with safety equipment and instructions.

standard.title: Standard Jet Ski
standard.description: Perfect for beginners and casual riders. Experience the thrill of jet skiing with our reliable standard model.

premium.title: Premium Jet Ski
premium.description: For those seeking more power and speed. Our premium models offer enhanced performance and features.

group.title: Group Package
group.description: Special package for groups. Rent multiple jet skis and enjoy a day of fun on the water with friends or family.

travel.title: Guided Tours & Experiences
travel.subtitle: Discover the beauty of our coastline with our expert-guided tours. Perfect for adventure seekers and nature lovers.

coastal_tour.title: Coastal Explorer Tour
coastal_tour.description: Experience the stunning coastline with our most popular guided tour. Perfect for first-time visitors and photography enthusiasts.

sunset_tour.title: Sunset Adventure Tour
sunset_tour.description: Witness a breathtaking sunset over the water while enjoying a thrilling ride along the coast.

private_tour.title: Private Charter Tour
private_tour.description: Customize your own adventure with a private tour tailored to your preferences and interests.
